entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `entityType` TEXT NOT NULL, `entityKey` TEXT NOT NULL, `enqueuedAt` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` TEXT NOT NULL, `attemptCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, `lastAttemptAt` INTEGER, `lastError` TEXT)

indices.name: index_sync_jobs_entityType
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_jobs_entityType` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`entityType`)

indices.name: index_sync_jobs_status
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_jobs_status` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`status`)

indices.name: index_sync_jobs_entityType_entityKey
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_sync_jobs_entityType_entityKey` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`entityType`, `entityKey`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
